description: Flag School.ai contract discrepancy. Draft MMM explaining growth execution work vs. contractual PSEO commitment. Send to Marcel for review/sending.
Ping Firework CMO. If no response, prepare email re: contract changes (12mo, $15k/mo or $9k/mo honor price). Offer easy out option.

Push back on 2x weekly Firework calls. Suggest winding down engagement due to resource mismatch. Emphasize outdated pricing model, dedication of senior resources (20+ year exp ME, TripAdvisor SEO lead).
Schedule and conduct listening tour with Elvis to discuss workload and account concerns.
